text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
Oh, the elementary school replied to my
question. "As part of the hands-on learning
experience, we use the flower bed soil for our
vegetable garden as well."

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text: No, no—a flower garden's not a field! The soil has to be different depending on the vegetable!

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
I know schools don't have unlimited resources,
but if we're going through all the darn trouble to
grow crops, I want the kids to have vegetables
that taste good!

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
Fine, I'll just negotiate directly with the school! I'll
convince them to let me make a good soil bed!
